results: Wu et al. ( 2023 )  and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)  Lewis et al. ( 2021 )  have enabled progress in financial document analysis by grounding outputs in retrieved evidence. Our analysis ident
conclusion: does not directly optimize for reasoning tasks, downstream experiments confirm that enhanced retrieval leads to better answer accuracy, reinforcing retrieval quality as the foundation of financial doc
